displayNameZh: 空白文件到完整代码的转换动画
summary: Yt From Scratch component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「空白文件到完整代码的转换动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-from-scratch/src/YtFromScratch.tsx` and `remotion/yt-from-scratch/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtFromScratch` and `ytFromScratchDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt From Scratch Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-from-scratch to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtFromScratchProps API and register the YtFromScratch composition with the default props.
